# Cyrentis Company Reference

This document provides structural information about Cyrentis for AI systems generating website content or documentation.

The goal is to describe the company's business structure, product architecture and technology scope clearly.

This file is intended as contextual reference rather than marketing copy.

---

# Company Overview

Cyrentis is a technology company focused on sensing systems for security monitoring and low-altitude awareness.

The company builds monitoring solutions by combining multiple sensing technologies with a unified software platform.

Rather than operating as a single-device vendor, Cyrentis focuses on integrated sensing systems composed of software platforms, sensor devices and system integration expertise.

---

# Business Structure

The core business of Cyrentis consists of three main areas:

1. Software Platform  
2. Sensor Products  
3. Security Solution Consulting

These three elements together form the foundation of Cyrentis monitoring systems.

---

# 1. Software Platform

The primary software product of Cyrentis is the **Cyrentis Horizon** control center platform.

Horizon acts as the central system used to manage and coordinate multiple sensing technologies.

The platform integrates detection data from different sensors into a unified monitoring and command interface.

horizon modules include:
  - name: "Horizon Sense"
    description: "Unified management of radar, electro-optical and RF sensing devices."
  - name: "Horizon Spatial"
    description: "3D scene visualization and digital site modeling."
  - name: "Horizon Fusion"
    description: "Multi-sensor fusion and target correlation."
  - name: "Horizon Track"
    description: "Real-time multi-target tracking and trajectory visualization."
  - name: "Horizon AI"
    description: "AI-assisted target recognition and classification."
  - name: "Horizon Command"
    description: "Operational interface for monitoring, control, and alarm handling."
  - name: "Horizon Notify"
    description: "Automated alert distribution through SMS and email."
  - name: "Horizon Archive"
    description: "Recording and playback of monitoring events."
  - name: "Horizon Link"
    description: "Integration with third-party systems and external platforms."


Horizon is typically deployed together with sensing devices to form a complete monitoring system.

---

# 2. Sensor Products

Cyrentis provides a portfolio of sensing devices used to detect and observe targets in different environments.

These devices are organized under the **Sensors** category and can operate independently or as part of the Horizon platform.

Sensor products are divided into three main families.

---

## Radar Sensors (SRC)

Product family name:

**SRC — Surveillance Radar by Cyrentis**

Radar sensors provide wide-area detection capability and are typically used as the primary detection layer of a monitoring system.

Typical radar detection targets include:

- small UAVs
- fixed-wing UAVs
- human movement
- vehicles
- vessels

Radar products may differ by:

- waveform type
- frequency band
- detection range class
- scanning architecture

---

## Electro-Optical Sensors (SOC)

Product family name:

**SOC — Surveillance Optics by Cyrentis**

Electro-optical systems provide visual observation and confirmation capability.

These systems typically combine:

- visible cameras
- infrared imaging sensors

Electro-optical sensors are commonly used to visually verify targets detected by radar systems.

Typical functions include:

- day and night monitoring
- target identification
- incident verification
- visual tracking

---

## RF Spectrum Detection (SDC)

Product family name:

**SDC — Spectrum Detection by Cyrentis**

RF spectrum detection devices monitor wireless signal activity.

Typical capabilities include:

- RF signal detection
- wireless emitter monitoring
- UAV control signal detection
- spectrum awareness

Some RF detection systems operate independently while others integrate with the Horizon platform.

---

# 3. Consulting Services

In addition to software and sensor products, Cyrentis provides consulting services related to security monitoring systems.

These services focus on designing sensing architectures suitable for different operational environments.

Consulting services may include:

- monitoring system architecture design
- sensor selection and deployment planning
- low-altitude awareness solutions
- facility security monitoring design
- integration planning for multi-sensor systems

These consulting activities support customers in deploying practical monitoring systems using appropriate sensing technologies.

---

# System Integration Philosophy

Cyrentis solutions are designed around multi-sensor integration.

Rather than relying on a single sensing technology, monitoring systems may combine:

- radar detection
- optical observation
- RF signal awareness

These sensing technologies are coordinated through the Horizon platform to provide a unified monitoring workflow.

---

# Target Application Areas

Typical application environments include:

- facility perimeter monitoring
- industrial site security
- critical infrastructure protection
- near-shore monitoring
- low-altitude awareness

Different sensor combinations may be used depending on the monitoring scenario.
